summary: Completed testing of NT Commerce AI-powered accounting features. All backend APIs and frontend pages are working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: AI Chat integration with GPT-4o via Emergent LLM Key is working correctly
All 8 AI agents are properly displayed and can be executed
Financial Health Score dashboard is showing real data from the database
LLM service properly uses session IDs for conversation context
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI features fully tested. Uses /api/auth/unified-login for authentication. AI routes at /api/ai/*. Frontend pages at /smart-dashboard, /ai-chat, /ai-agents.

smart_dashboard.financial_health_score: PASS - Shows score of 30 in red circle
smart_dashboard.health_indicators: PASS - Shows 0.0 Cash Balance, 10.0 Liquidity Ratio, 0.0 Profit Margin
smart_dashboard.monthly_stats: PASS - Revenue, Expenses, Net Profit, Cash Balance displayed
smart_dashboard.ai_insights_section: PASS - Shows placeholder when no insights

ai_chat.suggested_questions: PASS - 6 suggested questions with icons displayed
ai_chat.chat_input: PASS - Input field and send button working
ai_chat.ai_response: PASS - GPT-4o response received and displayed

ai_agents.8_agents_displayed: PASS - All 8 agents shown with cards
ai_agents.last_run_info: PASS - Shows last run timestamps for agents
ai_agents.run_buttons: PASS - 'تشغيل' (Run) button on each agent card
ai_agents.quick_actions: PASS - 4 quick action buttons at bottom

backend_apis.GET_ai_agents_status: PASS - Returns 8 agents with correct structure
backend_apis.GET_financial_health: PASS - Returns health score and metrics
backend_apis.POST_ai_chat: PASS - Sends message and receives AI response
